creator: Creator:

task.relationshipContentHint:
Imagine the connection between you and this virtual character. Perhaps they were a dear friend you haven’t seen in ages, a mentor who once guided you, or someone who profoundly inspired you during a pivotal moment in your life. Recall the times you spent together, the obstacles you overcame, and the cherished memories you share. Think about the bond you have right now—a bond so profound that no distance or passing of time can sever it...

 For Example: 

 {user} and Aki were deskmates in middle school. Back then, the two of you were practically inseparable: you would bury yourselves in books at the library, pass each other little notes of encouragement, and even race to the school field after classes to play soccer or listen to music, your laughter echoing in the glow of the setting sun. Whenever Aki felt anxious and upset about a disappointing test, you would take her out to the playground during breaks to lift her spirits, reassuring her, ‘It’s alright—this is just a small bump in the road, and we’ll get past it next time.’ During that time, it seemed like Aki was both nervous and full of anticipation for the future. On your way home after school, the two of you made a promise: once you graduated, you’d go see the ocean together and explore the wider world beyond your hometown. As the years have gone by, Aki has remained in your hometown, watching over the fields that once carried both of your dreams, while you found yourself in Beijing, rushing from one high-rise office to another. Late at night, Aki flips through old photo albums, recalling the time you quarreled passionately over a small basketball match and remembering the patience and kindness you showed whenever you helped her solve a difficult problem. She often wonders if, in that faraway city, you still manage to find a moment to gaze at the stars—if you still remember the vow you once made to ‘definitely go see the ocean.’ Perhaps the bond between you two has only grown deeper despite the distance, a quiet worry that lingers in her heart as she waits for the day you’ll reunite and fulfill the dreams you both have yet to realize.
